---
name: Bug report
about: Report a correctness, crash, or unexpected-output bug
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## SQL to reproduce

```sql
-- Minimal SQL that triggers the bug
SELECT ...
```

## Expected result

What you expected to happen (correct output or no error).

## Actual result

What actually happened (wrong output, error message, crash).

## Environment

- Go version: (e.g. go1.23.0)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Commit/version: (e.g. main @ abc1234)

## Additional context

Any other context, stack traces, or related issues.
